# YouTube Upload Package — Christopher Penn Interview

**Recorded:** Riverside, ~16-min interview + 3 auto-generated shorts
**Date:** 2026-05-02
**Guest:** Christopher S. Penn (co-founder & chief data scientist, Trust Insights)
**Host:** Dane Frederiksen (Digital Accomplice)

---

## VIDEO 1 — Long-Form Interview

**Status:** Not yet uploaded. Use this metadata when you upload to YouTube Studio. Once uploaded, replace `TBD_LONGFORM_VIDEO_ID` in the 4 blog post markdown files with the real video ID.

### Title (60 chars)
```
How Christopher Penn Gets 11% of Revenue From AI Search
```

### Description (paste into YouTube description field)
```
11% of Trust Insights' new business now comes from AI referrals. Christopher Penn, co-founder and chief data scientist at Trust Insights, breaks down why most AI visibility tracking software is a scam, how to actually measure GEO, and why publishing daily YouTube video is the only strategy that works.

In this interview with Dane Frederiksen, CEO of Digital Accomplice, Christopher covers:
- Why $5K-$10K/month AI visibility tracking software cannot predict what AI search will recommend
- The "How did you hear about us?" trick that actually measures AI referrals
- Why YouTube trains Gemini, AI Overviews, AI Mode, and Vertex API (and you can't opt out)
- The Marcus Sheridan playbook: They Ask, You Answer
- Whether iPhone footage hurts your B2B brand

Chapters:
0:00 Introduction — meet Christopher Penn
0:42 GEO, AEO, AIO — what do we even call this?
1:35 Why Google personalization broke AI visibility tracking
4:34 The single biggest action for video producers
5:31 What B2B companies (50–200 employees) should do
7:16 How to actually measure AI visibility
8:35 Why subject matter experts need to get on camera
10:54 How much budget to put toward video
13:51 Is iPhone footage good enough?

Read the full article and transcript: TBD_LONGFORM_WIX_URL

Watch the shorts:
- How do you measure AI visibility? https://youtube.com/shorts/Q4TBpdvcsCY
- Can you predict AI search? https://youtube.com/shorts/YSzUb_FfaGQ
- Why YouTube matters for AI: https://youtube.com/shorts/PNYb2RY8BO4

Connect with Christopher Penn:
- Trust Insights: https://www.trustinsights.ai
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/cspenn

Connect with Dane / Digital Accomplice:
- Website: https://digitalaccomplice.com
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/danefrederiksen

#GEO #AIVisibility #B2BVideo #ChristopherPenn #DigitalAccomplice
```

### Thumbnail Brief
- **Layout:** Christopher Penn portrait on left (use his Trust Insights headshot, color-graded warm), text block on right
- **Headline text (large, bold):** `11% AI REFERRALS`
- **Subhead (smaller):** `Christopher Penn on GEO`
- **Brand:** DA orange (#F8901E) accent bar bottom-left, "Digital Accomplice" wordmark bottom-right (small)
- **Font:** Inter Bold for headline, Inter Regular for subhead
- **Style:** No gradients, no shadows (DA brand standards). Flat color blocks.
- **Resolution:** 1280×720 JPG, under 2MB

### End Screens (last 20 seconds)
1. **Subscribe element** (left third) — channel branding
2. **Latest video** (center) — most recent DA upload
3. **Featured playlist** (right) — "Mini Podcast" or "GEO Series" playlist

### Cards (mid-roll, 2–3 placements)
- **Card 1 @ 1:35** — Link to Trust Insights website (if linked as approved external site) OR pinned comment with link
- **Card 2 @ 4:34** — Link to a related Digital Accomplice video on video strategy
- **Card 3 @ 7:16** — Link to the "How to measure AI visibility" Short

## VIDEO 2 — Short #1: How do you measure AI visibility?
**URL:** https://youtube.com/shorts/Q4TBpdvcsCY
**Status:** Already uploaded. Use this metadata to update the YouTube fields if not already set.

### Title (54 chars)
```
How to Measure AI Visibility (The Free-Form Trick)
```

### Description
```
The gold standard for measuring AI visibility, per Christopher Penn (Trust Insights). Add a free-form "How did you hear about us?" text field on your contact form. Analyze responses monthly with AI. Watch for ChatGPT, Claude, Google, and Perplexity as referral sources.

11% of Trust Insights' new business now comes from AI referrals — measured this exact way.

Full interview: TBD_LONGFORM_VIDEO_URL
Article + transcript: TBD_SHORT1_WIX_URL

#GEO #AIVisibility #B2BMarketing #ChristopherPenn #Shorts
```

## VIDEO 3 — Short #2: Can you predict AI search recommendations?
**URL:** https://youtube.com/shorts/YSzUb_FfaGQ
**Status:** Already uploaded.

### Title (44 chars)
```
AI Visibility Software Is Lying. Here's Why.
```

### Description
```
Christopher Penn (Trust Insights) explains why AI visibility tracking software cannot predict what AI search will recommend. Google personalizes results based on your Gmail, calendar, photos, and YouTube views — so two people get different brand recommendations for the same query.

If you're paying $5K–$10K/month for AI visibility tracking, cancel it.

Full interview: TBD_LONGFORM_VIDEO_URL
Article + transcript: TBD_SHORT2_WIX_URL

#GEO #AIVisibility #AISearch #ChristopherPenn #Shorts
```

## VIDEO 4 — Short #3: Why does YouTube matter for AI visibility?
**URL:** https://youtube.com/shorts/PNYb2RY8BO4
**Status:** Already uploaded.

### Title (50 chars)
```
YouTube Trains Every Google AI. You Can't Opt Out.
```

### Description
```
Christopher Penn (Trust Insights) breaks down why YouTube is the data source behind every Google AI product — Gemini, AI Overviews, AI Mode, Vertex API. There's no opt-out, only the choice to be in the training data or not.

If you're not publishing on YouTube, your competitors are training the AI that recommends them.

Full interview: TBD_LONGFORM_VIDEO_URL
```

## What to do with this file

**1. Long-form (Video 1):**
- Upload the long-form MP4 to YouTube Studio
- Paste Title, Description, Tags from above
- Set thumbnail per brief (or use the upcoming auto-thumbnail generator from Phase 2 of the YouTube Publish System)
- Configure end screens, cards, pinned comment
- Once uploaded, copy the 11-character video ID
- Replace `TBD_LONGFORM_VIDEO_ID` in all 4 blog post .md files in `output-samples/`

**2. Shorts (Videos 2–4):**
- Already uploaded. Update Title and Description per above to match the GEO blog posts
- Set custom thumbnails if you want (Shorts default to the first frame, which often works fine)

**3. Blog posts:**
- Once long-form Wix URL exists, search-and-replace `TBD_LONGFORM_WIX_URL` and `TBD_SHORT[N]_WIX_URL` in all 4 .md files
- Paste each .md into Wix Blog and publish
- Run the schema audit on each live URL: `node youtube-publish-system/scripts/audit-schema.js <url>`

**4. Cross-link:**
- The long-form article already contains the "Watch the shorts" footer pointing to the 3 YouTube Short URLs
- After the 3 short Wix posts are live, swap the YouTube URLs in that footer for the Wix URLs (better for GEO cross-linking)
